full_text:
Wang Kai 王楷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Kai (王楷). Helped Zhang Miao’s revolt, advised Lü Bu to seek Yuan Shu’s help. Wang Kai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Lu Bu.
